# `retail` — retail templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry (consumer-facing)  ·  **Templates:** 3

Phishing templates impersonating retail brands and loyalty programs

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Loyalty Rewards Expiration | [`loyalty_rewards_expiring.html`](loyalty_rewards_expiring.html) | credential_harvest | beginner | 45-65% |

## Template details

### Loyalty Rewards Expiration

- **File:** [`loyalty_rewards_expiring.html`](loyalty_rewards_expiring.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 45-65%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/retail_education.html`](education/retail_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your rewards points expire in 48 hours — claim now
  - Don't lose your rewards! Points expiring soon
  - Last chance: Redeem your loyalty points before they disappear
- **Operator notes:** FOMO (fear of missing out) template. High click rate due to universal appeal of not wanting to lose value.

### Amazon – Order Problem

- **File:** [`amazon_order_problem.html`](amazon_order_problem.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/retail_education.html`](education/retail_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - There was a problem processing your order
  - Action required: confirm your recent Amazon order
  - Your Amazon order is on hold
- **Operator notes:** Order-problem lure works year-round. Beginner difficulty; good for a baseline assessment.

### Costco – Membership Renewal Failed

- **File:** [`costco_membership_renewal.html`](costco_membership_renewal.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** beginner · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/retail_education.html`](education/retail_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your Costco membership auto-renewal failed
  - Action needed: update your membership payment
  - Your Costco membership is about to lapse
- **Operator notes:** Membership-renewal billing lure. Familiar everyday scenario; strong for general-population campaigns.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
